metadata.description: Vivreal Claude Code agents, workflows, skills, and tooling — installable from any repo. Principal-level generalist agents work everywhere; system-expert agents, auto-invoked knowledge skills (per-repo digests + cross-cutting infrastructure + design-system/unit-economics/brand-voice), active Sentry tracing, a read-only live-infrastructure ops investigator, read-only product/business audit agents (finance, marketing, UX), and the bug/feature workflow target the Vivreal ecosystem.

plugins.name: vivreal-principal
plugins.description: Repo-agnostic principal-level agents: single-dispatch coordinator, coder, architect, researcher, reviewer, designer, and growth auditor. Auto-dispatched for design+build, audits, refactors, code review, and GTM analysis in any repository.

plugins.name: vivreal-experts
plugins.description: Read-only system-expert consultants for the Vivreal backends and portal (cms-api, secure-api, main-api, client-stack, event-handler, outreach-api, portal). Auto-dispatched when working inside a Vivreal ecosystem repo and you need that system's gotchas.

plugins.name: vivreal-workflow
plugins.description: The Vivreal bug/feature workflow: coordinator + research/architect/coder/tester/reviewer/documenter/vuln role agents, their slash commands (/orchestrate, /coordinator, /research, /design, /implement, /test, /reviewer, /vuln-fix), and the shared-standards skill.

plugins.name: vivreal-knowledge
plugins.description: Auto-invoked knowledge skills: safe multi-tenant MongoDB query rules (vivreal-db), cross-stack Sentry tracing (sentry-tracer), the site product/authoring model (vivreal-sites), the portal design system (vivreal-design-system), the cost/margin model (vivreal-unit-economics), the brand voice (vivreal-brand-voice), and a per-repo knowledge digest for each Vivreal repo (portal, CMS/Secure/Main APIs, the public Client stack, EventHandler, Templates, site-renderer, MCP server, and the Outreach API). Skills load passively from intent — install everywhere you touch Vivreal code or data.

plugins.name: vivreal-infra
plugins.description: Auto-invoked CROSS-CUTTING infrastructure & architecture knowledge skills spanning the whole Vivreal AWS stack: Lambda packaging/deploy + reserved-concurrency scaling (vivreal-lambda, with the Mongo-connection ceiling), API Gateway + Cognito + the Client API key authorizer, the Step Functions + Amplify site-deploy pipeline, IAM + Secrets Manager (hb-api-secrets), MongoDB Atlas topology/ops, the media CDN + S3 + CloudFront signing, and the WebSocket real-time API. Distinct from vivreal-knowledge's per-repo digests — this is the plumbing that crosses repos. Skills load passively from intent.

plugins.name: vivreal-sentry
plugins.description: Active Sentry investigation tooling: the `sentry` agent (wired to the Sentry MCP) + the /sentry-trace command. Reconstructs the cross-stack timeline (browser → edge proxy → backend Lambda → MongoDB → WebSocket) to answer 'what happened when I did X', investigate errors, validate deploys, and run tenant-scoped triage. The active companion to the passive sentry-tracer knowledge skill in vivreal-knowledge.

plugins.name: vivreal-ops
plugins.description: The vivreal-ops agent — a READ-ONLY investigator of RUNNING Vivreal infrastructure (live AWS Lambda config/concurrency, Step Functions execution history, API Gateway, IAM, Secrets Manager, MongoDB Atlas state). Investigates the deployed reality and recommends; fixes route to principal-coder/coder. Grounded in the vivreal-infra + vivreal-db skills. Distinct from principal-architect (design) and the sentry agent (Sentry telemetry).

plugins.name: vivreal-product
plugins.description: READ-ONLY product & business audit agents: finance-auditor (unit economics, gross margin, AWS/Atlas/Anthropic cost stack, scale economics, ~80% margin-floor guard), marketing-auditor (brand-voice + marketing best-practices critique of customer-facing copy), and ux-critic (dual-lens naive-user + UX-designer usability critique of portal and customer-site screens, with a Playwright walkthrough). All advisory — they evaluate and recommend; fixes route to principal-coder/coder, content-creator/content-planner, or designer/principal-designer. Grounded in the vivreal-unit-economics, vivreal-brand-voice, and vivreal-design-system knowledge skills. Distinct from the growth agents (funnel/conversion/retention economics) and the designer agents (which design+build).

plugins.name: vivreal-fullstack
plugins.description: Cross-repo context loading, end-to-end feature scaffolding, and full-stack request tracing — the fullstack-tracer agent, the fullstack-context auto-loader skill, and the /fullstack scaffold command.

plugins.name: vivreal-proxy-factory
plugins.description: Generate factory-based proxy routes for the Vivreal portal with /proxy-route, plus a PreToolUse hook that guards against manual route drift outside the known-manual exceptions.

plugins.name: vivreal-db-explorer
plugins.description: Safe multi-tenant MongoDB querying and schema exploration via the /db-query and /db-schema commands — dbKey routing, archived/tenant safety guards, credential redaction, and the collection map.

plugins.name: vivreal-growth-analytics
plugins.description: Growth analytics and funnel analysis — the growth-advisor agent + growth-context skill + /growth-report and /funnel-analysis commands, unifying GA4, PostHog, and MongoDB user data.

plugins.name: vivreal-cms
plugins.description: Skill for operating a Vivreal account via the Vivreal MCP server — content collections, channels, sites, Stripe billing, and the canonical set-active-group workflow.
